name: W5 Legs Morning Flow
description: 15 min hip + squat prep. Same structure as W4 with deeper holds. Legs should be fresh — Thursday KB was light skill work only. 70/side is the floor, 75 is the goal.

exercises.notes: 3 seconds down, hold at the bottom for 2, drive up. You've been squatting for 4 weeks — own this pattern.
Low lunge + twist. Hip flexors and thoracic.
45s each side. By now this should be noticeably deeper than W4.
30s each side. Elbows down if you can — deeper than pigeon for the hip flexor.
Deep side lunge. Heels down. Your cossack squat practice makes these feel natural now.
Squeeze at top. Activates glutes before you squat.
Core bracing before loading the bar.
NEW — replacing hollow body. Oblique activation + hip mobility in one move. 6 each side.

tips: 15 min — lizard pose is new this week. Deeper hip flexor stretch than pigeon.
Thursday KB was light skill work — legs should feel fresh. If they don't, something went wrong Thursday.
Plank hip dips: new core move. Obliques + hip mobility for squat stability.
You're squatting 70/side as a baseline this week. This flow matters.
If short on time: hip warmup + pigeon + glute bridge. 8 min minimum.
